headline: Morgan Stanley issues blunt call on Netflix stock post earnings
summary: Netflix (NFLX) released its Q1 2026 results on April 16, to a bearish response from Wall Street. Though it posted a relatively decent quarter, cautious guidance took the shine off the report, leading to a dip in stock price. Morgan Stanley analysts, however, didn’t flinch and remained unwaveringly ...

headline: How The Iridium Communications (IRDM) Story Is Shifting Around Spectrum Optionality And Growth Timing
summary: The fair value estimate for Iridium Communications has been updated from US$29.00 to US$30.38, a modest move that still matters if you are tracking where analysts think the shares belong. That shift is being framed around fresh commentary on spectrum assets, with some research tying higher targets to the idea that Iridium’s spectrum and related optionality could support more value than its core satellite services alone. Read on to see how this evolving narrative might shape how you follow the...

headline: Are higher oil prices really bullish for EV battery stocks?
summary: Investing.com -- Despite a prevailing market narrative that surging oil prices will inevitably spark a boom in electric vehicle (EV) demand, analysts at Morgan Stanley are taking a more cautious view regarding a near-term recovery for South Korean battery manufacturers.
